name: Catalog
description: Product catalog, v1: owner-scoped CRUD on a single products schema covering physical goods, digital downloads, services, subscriptions, and depreciable assets (product_type). Money is integer cents (price_cents/cost_cents/salvage_value_cents), never a float or currency type. Deferred to a later slice, per the reconciled predecessor catalog model (private source audit, not part of this repo): orders, order lines, stock moves and derived stock levels, warehouse/bin locations, a public storefront view (products stay owner-scoped, same posture as app-invoices), and the actual finance-account linkage / depreciation-schedule behavior behind income_account/expense_account/the ASSET fields (carried as plain fields now so nothing needs a backfill later). Product detail permalinks need a site_routes record mapping /products/{product_id:uuid} to site_product_view -- not seeded by this package, same precedent as app-notes' /notes/{note_id:uuid} and app-invoices' /invoices/{invoice_id:uuid}.
